title: A level and other 16 to 18 results: 2025 (provisional)
body: "Provisional information on the overall achievement of students at the end of their 16 to 18 study in England by the end of the 2024 to 2025 academic year.  For schools and colleges this includes:   A levels and other academic level 3 qualifications technical certificate qualifications at level 2 English and maths progress measures   Key headline statistics are broken down by:   student characteristics institution type geographical areas based on school and college location  "

taxons.title: Key stage 5 exam marking, qualifications and results
